enrichment.summary: Kyle gives a life update vlog covering his bike time trial on haystack while high for a blood THC test, progress on his history/classics website, completing court-ordered community service picking up trash along Boulder Creek, financial plans around taking over a window-washing business, and goals for his website in the coming year.
enrichment.speaker: kyle

stances.position: out of shape but his science/predictions about performance level were accurate
proud of its scope and unique single-page design but acknowledges it looks unfinished to outsiders
sympathetic and observational; views it as a cost-effective way to house people who don't want traditional life
plans to take over the window-washing business rather than sell his car, sees it as a path to stability while building YouTube/website income
putting all content of one book together on one page is superior to splitting by title
